archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Archetype 4) mixed with Performance Pro (Archetype 2)

brand.name: FW Worldwide
brand.logo_instructions: Red square icon with white >> chevrons. Text 'FW WORLDWIDE' in Bebas Neue, colored Navy (light background) or White (dark background). Tagline 'FORWARD. ALWAYS.' in Space Mono below.

colors.primary_description: Red: CTAs, buttons, accents, icon blocks
colors.secondary_description: Deep Navy Blue: Hero backgrounds, nav, footer, section backgrounds
colors.accent_description: Signal Yellow: Highlights, badges, hover states, dividers
rules: No generic full-screen gradients. Focus on solid color blocks.
Yellow must be used sparingly as an accent.
Red is exclusively for primary actions and key focal points.

headings.style_rules: All-caps feel, tight tracking (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter), leading-none for H1.

labels.style_rules: Uppercase, wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]), used for tags, data fields, IDs.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, p-16, py-24 for sections. High breathing room.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento grids or strict asymmetrical columns. E.g., 3 columns with yellow left-border for 'Why Choose Us'.
layout_and_spacing.borders_and_radii: Sharp edges or minimal rounding (rounded-none or rounded-sm). Sturdy, industrial B2B feel.
layout_and_spacing.shadows: Subtle shadows only (shadow-sm, shadow-md). Avoid soft diffuse shadows, lean towards crisp drop-shadows.

motion_and_interaction.scroll: Smooth scroll (lenis recommended if possible, or standard CSS smooth scroll).
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Buttons shift slightly (-translate-y-1) or color transition to darker red. Navy to Red hover for service cards.

media_and_images.rules: Use high-quality logistics photography. No childish clip art. Overlay text must have contrast.

image_urls.description: Red cargo ship matching the brand's primary color. Ideal for the main hero section.
Large jetliner in cloudy sky for Air Freight services.
Red semi-truck on a highway. Matches brand red.
Lone cargo ship for ocean freight detail.

components_and_tech.icons: Use lucide-react for standard UI icons (truck, plane, ship, anchor, package). Use react-icons/si (e.g., SiDhl, SiFedex, SiMaersk) for carrier logos.
components_and_tech.forms: Use Shadcn UI for the Contact Form and dropdowns.
components_and_tech.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g. data-testid='hero-cta-button').

pages_structure.home: Sticky navbar. Navy hero with Red CTA. Stats bar. 4 service cards alternating Red/Navy. Value-Added Services grid. 3-col Why Choose Us with Yellow borders. Carrier logo grid. Mission split panel. Red CTA banner.
pages_structure.services: Hero 'OUR SERVICES'. 4 featured services. Safety section (training, tracking).
pages_structure.about: Company intro, Mission/Vision, Why Choose Us, Team values.
pages_structure.carriers: Grid of airline + shipping line logos.
pages_structure.contact: Form with service dropdown, contact details card on Navy, Google Maps embed.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use generic rounded borders; keep the design industrial and sharp.
Implement the 'Preferred Carriers' grid using popular logistics brands from react-icons/si if actual images are unavailable.
Make sure navigation is fully accessible and responsive.
Use Framer Motion to add subtle fade-in animations on scroll.
Ensure all text over images or dark panels meets APCA/WCAG contrast ratios.
Include Bebas Neue, DM Sans, and Space Mono from Google Fonts in index.html or layout.
